aliases: Aryan Nations Sadistic Souls Motorcycle Club
nodes.context: White supremacist outlaw motorcycle club founded in 2010, acts as militant arm of Aryan Nations.
Neo-Nazi organization based in North America, with which Sadistic Souls MC merged in 2012.
Racist organization part of a coalition with Sadistic Souls MC and The Creativity Movement.
Racist organization part of a coalition with Sadistic Souls MC and United Klans of America.

edges.context: Sadistic Souls MC was formed as the militant arm of Aryan Nations and formally merged with them in 2012.
Part of a coalition called 'The Black & Silver Solution' along with The Creativity Movement.
Part of a coalition called 'The Black & Silver Solution' along with United Klans of America.
